destaque.descricao: Turn your model into a photorealistic image in seconds. No complex setup, no expensive GPU, no leaving SketchUp.

antesDepois.titulo: From raw model to photorealistic render.
antesDepois.descricao: Drag the ruler to compare. The same SketchUp scene, transformed by Kora in seconds.

comoFunciona.titulo: Three steps. One click. Professional results.

etapas.descricao: Download the installer and activate Kora inside SketchUp in under 1 minute.
Use any model, at any level of detail. Kora understands the rest.
Choose a preset, click render, and get a photorealistic result.

funcionalidades.titulo: Everything you need to render with confidence.

itens.descricao: Photorealistic images generated in seconds from your model.
Lighting and reflections that respect materials and scene context.
Adjust fidelity to the model and the AI's creative level.
Ready-made styles for interiors, facades, and outdoor scenes.
Edit specific areas while keeping the rest of the composition intact.
Export renders in presentation-ready quality for clients.
Everything inside SketchUp, with no learning curve.
New models and features released continuously.

galeria.titulo: Real renders made by Kora users.

planos.titulo: Choose the plan that's right for you.
planos.subtitulo: No hidden fees. Cancel anytime. 7-day guarantee.

itens.citacao: Kora cut my rendering time by 80%. I present renders in the same meeting where I design the project.
Finally a render inside SketchUp that looks real. My clients love the level of realism.
The combination of AI plus manual controls is brilliant. I get model fidelity when I want it and creative freedom when I need it.

perguntasFrequentes.textoAjuda: Can't find your answer? Reach us at

itens.resposta: No. Kora uses cloud processing to generate AI renders, so an internet connection is required during use.

itens.pergunta: Do I need a powerful graphics card?
itens.resposta: No. All the heavy processing happens on our servers. Your computer just needs to run SketchUp normally.

itens.pergunta: Can I use it for commercial projects?
itens.resposta: Yes. All Kora licenses, including the monthly plan, allow unlimited use in commercial and client projects.
The macOS version is in development and coming soon. Kora is currently available for Windows only.
We offer a 7-day guarantee on all plans. If Kora doesn't meet your expectations, we refund 100% of the amount paid.

chamadaAcao.descricao: Join thousands of architects delivering faster, with more quality.

rodape.descricao: AI rendering for SketchUp. Built for architects and designers.
